use_cases: Audio or music player waveform visualization with customizable colors and complexity
Hero section backdrop with animated gradient waves responding to mouse movement
Loading or loading screen visual with dynamic flowing wave patterns
Interactive background component for landing pages or dashboards
Live data visualization canvas with glitch-style noise overlay
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered dynamic waveform component built with Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. Features multi-layered sine wave animation with configurable complexity, amplitude, and frequency parameters. Includes real-time mouse-driven distortion effects, gradient color mixing between two customizable colors, glowing line rendering, and a subtle static noise overlay. The component uses uniform-based shader architecture for smooth GPU-accelerated animation suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or audio visualization displays.
